name: affine-raycast
title: Affine
description: Search and open AFFiNE workspaces and documents from Raycast. Uses AFFiNE GraphQL API.
author: yassine_souilmi

commands.name: search-docs
commands.title: Search Affine Documents
commands.description: Search documents across workspaces and open in browser

commands.name: open-workspace
commands.title: Open Affine Workspace
commands.description: List workspaces and open one in browser

commands.name: open-doc
commands.title: Open Affine Document
commands.description: List documents in default workspace and open in browser

commands.name: new-doc
commands.title: New Affine Document
commands.description: Open AFFiNE in browser to create a new document

commands.name: setup-mcp
commands.title: Setup Affine AI (MCP)
commands.description: Instructions to add the AFFiNE MCP server so Raycast AI can read and write your docs

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: AFFiNE URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your AFFiNE instance (e.g. https://app.affine.pro)

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: AFFiNE API token from Settings → Integrations → MCP Server
